description: Google Cloud Identity-Aware Proxy (IAP) controls access to applications and resources by enforcing identity- and context-based access policies. The service includes APIs for managing IAP settings, OAuth brands and clients, and TCP destination groups.
summary: iap.googleapis.com exposes a Google Cloud REST API for managing Identity-Aware Proxy resources; Google also provides the `gcloud iap` CLI for the same product area using Google Cloud authentication.
